# LEZAC explosion playback oracle fixture v1
# Malformed synthetic fixture: lane-result scratch is present without the expected original byte signature.
capture=explosion_playback
source=dosbox-regular-process-memory
temp_copy=1
visual_claim=0
instrumented_freeze_observed=1
runtime_freeze_patch_applied=1
freeze_old_bytes=268805
instrumented_lane_result_scratch_present=1
instrumented_lane_result_cs_offset=0xf280
instrumented_lane_result_kind=forward
instrumented_lane_result_output=0x0004
instrumented_lane_result_es=0x2b3c
instrumented_lane_result_di=0x78d2
instrumented_lane_result_arg_offset=0x78d2
instrumented_lane_result_arg_segment=0x2b3c
instrumented_lane_result_result_local=0x0004
instrumented_lane_result_active_count=0x0001
instrumented_lane_result_loop_index=0x0001
instrumented_lane_result_target_before=0x0010

runtime_cs=1A2B
runtime_ds=2B3C
high_debris_target_delta=0001
high_debris_target_offset=0394
high_debris_lookup_segment=3EF4
high_debris_word_layer_offset=0000
high_debris_word_layer_segment=3F71
high_debris_word_layer_address=0728
high_debris_c204=0010
high_debris_target_byte=75
high_debris_word_layer_value=8009

break ghidra=1000:414A runtime=1A2B:414A label=explosion_dispatcher
break ghidra=1000:370E runtime=1A2B:370E label=tile_damage_queue
break ghidra=1000:45FA runtime=1A2B:45FA label=effect_debris_update_entry
break ghidra=1000:3D3F runtime=1A2B:3D3F label=collapse_forward_lane_result_write observed=runtime_child_memory_freeze_observed

dump DS:2090
2B3C:2090  00 00 00 93 03 00 c0 04 05 00 00 00 6b 00 00 00

dump DS:6610
2B3C:6610  00 06 0a 08 0a 09 80 02 03 00 00 05 00 00 00 04

dump DS:C21E
2B3C:C21E  18 00 28 00 84 75 08 05
